zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Darrel於1295年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維斯特波洛時，她的父親William Darrell60歲，母親Joan De Holtby58歲。她於1312年與John Deiville在美國賓夕法尼亞州薩默塞特薩默塞特 堂史普赫斯本德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年在英國林可爾史爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Darrel于1295年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維斯特波洛时，她的父亲William Darrell60岁，母亲Joan De Holtby58岁。她于1312年与John Deiville在美国宾夕法尼亚州薩默塞特薩默塞特 堂史普赫斯本德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1340年在英国林可爾史爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darrel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Harrell
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarghail ‘descendant of Earghal’, a variant of the personal name Fearghal (see Farrell ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Darrel was born in 1295, in Westborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Darrell, was 60 and her mother, Joan De Holtby, was 58. She married John Deiville in 1312, in Husband, Somerset Township, Somerset, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1340, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Darrel est née en 1295, à Westborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Darrell, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Joan De Holtby, avait 58 ans. Elle a épousé John Deiville en 1312, à Husband, Somerset Township, Somerset, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1340, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Darrel(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 웨스트버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Darrell(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan De Holtby(은)는 58세였다. 그녀는 1312년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 서머세트 서머세트 타운시프 후스반드에서 John Deiville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 링코실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Darrel родилась в 1295 г. в местности вестбороую, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Darrell было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Holtby, 58. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Deiville в 1312 г. в местности хусбанд, сомирсет тоуншип, сомирсет, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.
